summary: Blueprint app full-stack testing completed. 27/27 backend tests pass. All critical frontend flows work: welcome screen, signup → questionnaire redirect, 4-step questionnaire (saves to backend), match scores (99% VA for home+laptop+tech user), discover screen with category filters, idea detail, Start My Blueprint → interactive checklist, action step completion with progress tracking (14% after step 3/7), guest gating (steps 3-7 locked with 'Unlock with free account'). One minor bug found in idea-detail for null-user state.

ui_bugs.issue: When user=null (direct URL access without any session), shows 50% Match auth banner instead of guest lock banner, and all 7 action steps are visible (none locked). Root cause: condition `!user?.is_guest` evaluates to true when user is null because `null?.is_guest` = undefined and `!undefined` = true. Fix: change to `user && !user.is_guest` to show match banner only for authenticated non-guest users. Same applies to isLocked check and CTA button text.

react_native_issues.issue: Imports withTiming and withSpring from react-native-reanimated but never uses them (dead imports)

Uses Animated with useNativeDriver:true for scale/opacity, but `useNativeDriver` is not supported in Expo web preview. Animations may not display on web, but work correctly on native. MomentumAnim uses useNativeDriver:false (correct for height animation).

No testID attributes on any interactive elements (buttons, TextInput, cards, tabs). Makes automated testing reliant on text-based selectors which can break. Recommend adding testID to all TouchableOpacity, Pressable, TextInput components.

action_items: FIX (LOW): idea-detail.tsx - Change match banner condition from `!user?.is_guest` to `user && !user.is_guest` to handle null user case. Same fix for isLocked condition (`user?.is_guest && idx >= 2` → `user && user.is_guest && idx >= 2`) and CTA button (`user?.is_guest ? 'Create Account to Start' : 'Start My Blueprint'` → `(!user || user.is_guest) ? 'Create Account to Start' : 'Start My Blueprint'`)
CLEANUP: EarningsProgressBar.tsx - Remove unused imports `withTiming`, `withSpring` from react-native-reanimated
BEST PRACTICE: Add testID props to all interactive elements for automated testing
INFO: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage version 3.0.1 installed but Expo expects 2.2.0 - monitor for compatibility issues
critical_code_review_comments: idea-detail.tsx: Null user not handled as guest - shows wrong UI for unauthenticated direct URL access. Logic needs `user && !user.is_guest` instead of `!user?.is_guest`
idea-detail.tsx: calcMatchScore function duplicated from backend. Consider moving to shared utility or using backend response match_score field directly
EarningsProgressBar.tsx: Dead imports (withTiming, withSpring) should be removed
server.py: No auth middleware / JWT tokens. All user endpoints are unprotected - any user can read/modify another user's profile by knowing their UUID. Acceptable for MVP but should be noted.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows work, 1 minor null-user bug)

seed_data_creation: Created test user: tester@blueprint.com / TestPass123 (user_id: 64c59c73-18f1-4778-bf6e-b553af870ab5). Set profile: environment=home, social_preference=solo, assets=[laptop], questionnaire_interests=[tech,finance]. Digital-001 idea saved with step 3 completed (progress=14%).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user tester@blueprint.com/TestPass123 exists with home+laptop+tech+finance profile. Idea digital-001 (Web Designer) is saved with step 3 completed (14% progress). All 20 ideas seeded in DB with correct categories. The null-user scenario on idea-detail page is the only outstanding bug - low priority. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_blueprint.py cover all APIs.
rca_of_issue: Bug: When idea-detail.tsx loads with user=null (no AsyncStorage session), the UI shows auth-user-style match banner (50% Match) instead of the guest lock banner. Root cause: The ternary `!user?.is_guest` evaluates to true for both null users AND authenticated non-guest users (null?.is_guest = undefined, !undefined = true). This means unauthenticated users who directly visit an idea URL see incorrect UI. The fix is to change all three conditions: (1) match banner: `user && !user.is_guest` (2) isLocked: `user && user.is_guest && idx >= 2` (3) CTA text: `(!user || user.is_guest) ? 'Create Account to Start' : 'Start My Blueprint'`. This is low priority as the proper flow always goes through welcome→auth/guest screens which correctly set the user in AsyncStorage.
